title: lamprococcus fulgens
intro: Lamprococcus fulgens, also known as the "golden chamomile," is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Lamprococcus fulgens include its calming and soothing effects on the nervous system, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even help alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Lamprococcus fulgens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
